case_title: CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR''S OFFICE VS. DAVID MALAE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,335.00 FILED BY CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT MALAE, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALAE, DAVID $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,085.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 85.99 - SERVED AUG-30-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MALAE, DAVID
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,527.67 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MALAE, DAVID
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT MALAE, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAVE WONG--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALAE, DAVID $5,085.99 PRINCIPAL, $2,527.67 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,613.66

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE SERVED OCT-02-2025, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT MALAE, DAVID PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON DEC-08-2025 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
